title: Habenaria longicalcarata
intro: Habenaria longicalcarata is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia, commonly known as a medicinal plant. The health benefits of Habenaria longicalcarata include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, exhibit antioxidant properties, and possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it a valuable resource for treating various diseases. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Habenaria longicalcarata is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat conditions such as diabetes, fever, and respiratory infections.
taxonomy: Habenaria longicalcarata is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. This genus, Habenaria, is a large and diverse group of orchids that are found in many parts of the world. Habenaria longicalcarata is classified within the subfamily Orchidoideae. The subfamily Orchidoideae is further divided into several tribes, and Habenaria longicalcarata is a member of the tribe Orchideae. This classification is based on the plant's morphology and molecular characteristics.
